2023-24 BYU Cougars Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 23-11 (10-8, 5th in Big 12 MBB)

Coach: Mark Pope

PS/G: 81.4 (22nd of 362)

PA/G: 69.9 (111th of 362)

SRS: 19.33 (14th of 362)

SOS: 7.86 (60th of 362)

ORtg: 116.4 (17th of 362)

DRtg: 100.0 (78th of 362)

NCAA Tournament: (#6 seed in East)
Lost East First Round (71-67) versus #11 Duquesne
